capabilities.description: Searches OpenLibrary, GoogleBooks, ISBNdb, Hardcover, Goodreads, Amazon, Anna's Archive, Project Gutenberg, BookBrainz, FantasticFiction, ISFDB, LibraryThing, Internet Archive, WorldCat, and Douban.

global_config_schema.title: Postgres connection string
global_config_schema.description: DSN for the dedicated ebooksdb schema.

global_config_schema.title: Library root paths
global_config_schema.description: Absolute filesystem paths to scan for ebook files. JSON array of strings, e.g. ["/srv/ebooks"].

global_config_schema.title: Standalone HTTP listen address
global_config_schema.description: Optional. Bind a TCP listener (e.g. ':7880' or '127.0.0.1:7880') for direct catalog access. Leave empty to disable.

global_config_schema.title: Stream signing secret (HMAC)
global_config_schema.description: 32-byte base64-encoded shared secret used to sign presigned download URLs. Reserved for future use.

global_config_schema.title: Enabled metadata sources
global_config_schema.description: JSON array of source IDs to query. Defaults to all sources.

global_config_schema.title: Default metadata region
global_config_schema.description: ISO country code used when no per-request region is supplied. Defaults to "us".

global_config_schema.title: Metadata cache TTL (days)
global_config_schema.description: Number of days a positive metadata cache entry is retained. Defaults to 30.

global_config_schema.title: Metadata source rate limit (RPS)
global_config_schema.description: Per-source requests-per-second budget for the aggregator. Defaults to 5.

global_config_schema.title: Inline enrichment on scan
global_config_schema.description: When true, metadata enrichment runs synchronously after each library scan completes. Defaults to false.

global_config_schema.title: Scan enrichment source
global_config_schema.description: Source ID used by the enrichment worker during scans. Defaults to "openlibrary".

global_config_schema.title: Google Books API key
global_config_schema.description: Optional API key for the Google Books metadata source.

global_config_schema.title: ISBNdb API key
global_config_schema.description: Optional API key for the ISBNdb metadata source.

global_config_schema.title: Hardcover API key
global_config_schema.description: Optional API key for the Hardcover metadata source.
